issues.title: java.lang.NoSuchMethodError: 'void org.apache.tika.parser.pdf.PDF2XHTML.setIgnoreContentStreamSpaceGlyphs(boolean)'
issues.body:
Bug description

An error occurs when processing PDF files using TikaDocumentReader. This issue does not occur in version 1.0.0-M6.

Environment

Spring Boot version: 3.4.5
Spring AI version: 1.0.0-RC1 
Java version: 21

--- 

- Code 
```java
TikaDocumentReader reader = new TikaDocumentReader(resource);
```

- Output
```
java.lang.NoSuchMethodError: 'void org.apache.tika.parser.pdf.PDF2XHTML.setIgnoreContentStreamSpaceGlyphs(boolean)'
        at org.apache.tika.parser.pdf.PDFParserConfig.configure(PDFParserConfig.java:229)
        at org.apache.tika.parser.pdf.PDF2XHTML.process(PDF2XHTML.java:105)
        at org.apache.tika.parser.pdf.PDFParser.parse(PDFParser.java:219)
        at org.apache.tika.parser.CompositeParser.parse(CompositeParser.java:298)
        at org.apache.tika.parser.CompositeParser.parse(CompositeParser.java:298)
        at org.apache.tika.parser.AutoDetectParser.parse(AutoDetectParser.java:204)
        at org.springframework.ai.reader.tika.TikaDocumentReader.get(TikaDocumentReader.java:147)
        at org.springframework.ai.reader.tika.TikaDocumentReader.get(TikaDocumentReader.java:51)
        at org.springframework.ai.document.DocumentReader.read(DocumentReader.java:25)
```

- Maven
```xml
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.ai</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-ai-starter-model-vertex-ai-embedding</artifactId>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.ai</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-ai-starter-model-vertex-ai-gemini</artifactId>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.ai</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-ai-advisors-vector-store</artifactId>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.ai</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-ai-tika-document-reader</artifactId>
        </dependency>
```

comments.body: I tried to reproduce the issue using version 1.0.0-RC1, following the code and Maven dependencies you provided, but I was unable to replicate the problem. Could you provide a minimal demo project that can reproduce the issue? Additionally, Spring AI 1.0.0 GA has already been released — you could also try that version to see if the issue still persists.
`setIgnoreContentStreamSpaceGlyphs` was added in pdfbox 3.0.4 which is the version expected by Tika, however, the spring-ai-pdf-document-reader is using 3.0.3. We need to keep these in sync.
I'm using Spring AI 1.0.0. Is there a way to work around this problem without moving to snapshot version?
Yes you can add pdfbox version 3.0.4 as a dependency to your project and exclude the dependency from ai-pdf-document-reader.

issues.title: spring ai 调用 xinference 部署的qwen3模型，工具调用失败

comments.body: 这个可能需要调整发送给模型的提示语，以保证模型按预期的格式返回对应的信息。

> 这个可能需要调整发送给模型的提示语，以保证模型按预期的格式返回对应的信息。

是滴是滴  这个问题提交给xinference官方解决去了
我也遇到了这个问题，null或者''都可以，但是因为@JsonInclude(Include.NON_NULL)导致入参不存在content报错

issues.title: [Vector store] Clickhouse support
issues.body:
**Expected Behavior**

I would like to store embeddings in Clickhouse database and search related text there.

**Current Behavior**

There is no Clickhouse support.

**Context**

https://clickhouse.com/blog/vector-search-clickhouse-p2

Langchain4j supports Clickhouse.

comments.body: @markpollack WDYT, where Clickhouse vector store should be placed - here in core or in spring-ai-community?

Hi.  This sounds like a good candidate for spring-ai-community.  You should first create some working code and then submit a request [here](https://github.com/spring-ai-community/community/issues/new?template=application.yml).

Cheers!
@markpollack Created project request in spring-ai-community, can you please review it. Thank you 🙏

If somebody needs it right now - I've just published it to maven central
https://central.sonatype.com/artifact/io.github.linarkou/spring-ai-starter-vector-store-clickhouse
